mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tham_gia_du_an WHERE ma_nhan_vien = #{maNv} AND ma_du_an = #{maDa} AND thang = #{thang} AND nam = #{nam}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tham_gia_du_an (ma_nhan_vien, ma_du_an, thang, nam, vai_tro) VALUES (#{maNv}, #{maDa}, #{thang}, #{nam}, #{vaiTro})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tham_gia_du_an WHERE ma_nhan_vien = #{maNv} AND ma_du_an = #{maDa} AND thang = #{thang} AND nam = #{nam}
